whistleblower_flags.flag: CRITICAL: Stale code-index and unenforced Foundation Laws enable systemic drift. Prod integrity compromised.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Unbounded database query in /assessment/next endpoint: fetches all items regardless of user level, risking OOM at scale.", "recommended_fix": "Add LIMIT 50 and index on (competency, difficulty) for paginated item retrieval."}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "engine.py", "issue": "IRT scoring computed on every request without caching; latency will spike at 10x users.", "recommended_fix": "Cache theta estimates per user in Redis with 5m TTL and trigger async recalc on item submit."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts", "issue": "Energy mode update fires 4x per change via duplicate event listeners, increasing latency.", "recommended_fix": "Consolidate Supabase and local storage sync into single handler."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "engine.py", "apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts"]}

findings.issue: Unbounded database query in /assessment/next endpoint: fetches all items regardless of user level, risking OOM at scale.
findings.recommended_fix: Add LIMIT 50 and index on (competency, difficulty) for paginated item retrieval.

findings.issue: IRT scoring computed on every request without caching; latency will spike at 10x users.
findings.recommended_fix: Cache theta estimates per user in Redis with 5m TTL and trigger async recalc on item submit.

findings.issue: Energy mode update fires 4x per change via duplicate event listeners, increasing latency.
findings.recommended_fix: Consolidate Supabase and local storage sync into single handler.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Missing rate limiting on /assessment/start endpoint. Allows brute-force profile creation and resource exhaustion.", "recommended_fix": "Implement rate limiter using FastAPI middleware (e.g., slowapi) with limits per IP or user."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts", "issue": "Energy level stored in Supabase without RLS policy enforcement. Potential data leakage if policies misconfigured.", "recommended_fix": "Verify RLS policy 'enable_rls_on_user_settings' exists and enforces row-level security for user-owned records."}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py", "issue": "automated_decision_consent field is required but not validated for non-nullable in database. Risk of incomplete GDPR Art. 22 compliance.", "recommended_fix": "Ensure Supabase column has NOT NULL constraint and default value set to false."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/main.py", "supabase/init.sql"]}

findings.issue: Missing rate limiting on /assessment/start endpoint. Allows brute-force profile creation and resource exhaustion.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement rate limiter using FastAPI middleware (e.g., slowapi) with limits per IP or user.

findings.issue: Energy level stored in Supabase without RLS policy enforcement. Potential data leakage if policies misconfigured.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify RLS policy 'enable_rls_on_user_settings' exists and enforces row-level security for user-owned records.

findings.issue: automated_decision_consent field is required but not validated for non-nullable in database. Risk of incomplete GDPR Art. 22 compliance.
findings.recommended_fix: Ensure Supabase column has NOT NULL constraint and default value set to false.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/assessment/energy-picker.tsx", "issue": "Energy Adaptation UI does not dynamically adapt based on real-time user behavior or system load", "recommended_fix": "Implement dynamic adaptation using real-time data and system load monitoring"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Energy Adaptation UI does not dynamically adapt based on real-time user behavior or system load
findings.recommended_fix: Implement dynamic adaptation using real-time data and system load monitoring

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Code Quality Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/assessment/energy-picker.tsx", "issue": "Missing input validation for energy level selection", "recommended_fix": "Add type checking and bounds validation for energy level input"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", "issue": "Incomplete implementation of ISO 10667-2 grievance mechanism", "recommended_fix": "Finish implementing the grievance resolution workflow and add logging for audit purposes"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts", "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md"]}

findings.issue: Missing input validation for energy level selection
findings.recommended_fix: Add type checking and bounds validation for energy level input

findings.issue: Incomplete implementation of ISO 10667-2 grievance mechanism
findings.recommended_fix: Finish implementing the grievance resolution workflow and add logging for audit purposes

Agents are simulating.", "recommended_fix": "Regenerate code-index immediately and add pre-commit hook to update on every push."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "PRE-LAUNCH-BLOCKERS-STATUS.md", "issue": "Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance (P0 blocker #15) marked as ready-to-build but no DID or revocation logic exists. findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is violated across 4/5 products. Only MindShift implements Full/Mid/Low energy modes. VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, and Atlas lack mode persistence and UI adaptation.
findings.recommended_fix: Uniformly implement energy-mode context in all products using Supabase sync from MindShift's useEnergyMode hook. Extend data-energy attribute to all templates.

findings.issue: Code-index last built 2026-04-30 — 5 days ago. Stale index risks hallucinated paths and false confidence. Agents are simulating.
findings.recommended_fix: Regenerate code-index immediately and add pre-commit hook to update on every push.

findings.issue: Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance (P0 blocker #15) marked as ready-to-build but no DID or revocation logic exists. Badge tiers shown immediately post-assessment violate CRYSTAL LAW 6 amendment.
findings.recommended_fix: Defer public badge display until VC backend is built. Show only competence feedback post-assessment.

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: CRITICAL: Stale code-index and unenforced Foundation Laws enable systemic drift. Prod integrity compromised.

findings.issue: AURA score display lacks constitutional safeguards for sensitive user data
findings.recommended_fix: Implement access controls per ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION §4.2.1

findings.issue: Assessment endpoint missing consent verification for data collection
findings.recommended_fix: Add GDPR-compliant consent check before processing user input

findings.issue: Skill analysis module exposes unbounded query parameters
findings.recommended_fix: Implement input sanitization per OWASP ASV guidelines

findings.recommended_fix: Calibrate IRT 3PL parameters using real data

findings.issue: No evidence of DIF analysis in assessment engine
findings.recommended_fix: Implement DIF analysis to detect biased questions

findings.issue: Insufficient consent flow for automated decision-making under GDPR Article 22
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit user consent for automated decision-making before assessment start

findings.issue: Potential non-compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act for Baku launch

findings.issue: Potential platform liability if AURA score is used for hiring decisions without proper validation

findings.issue: Data processor agreements with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway may not be up-to-date
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update data processor agreements with all relevant parties

findings.issue: Terms of Service may not fully cover AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update Terms of Service to explicitly address AI-generated assessments

findings.issue: Lack of clear press narrative ready for launch
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a comprehensive press kit and media outreach strategy

findings.issue: Uncertainty about application material readiness

findings.issue: Incomplete pipeline with potential opportunities like Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, and AzInTelecom

findings.issue: Insufficient visibility and engagement on LinkedIn ahead of launch
